title: Iran Steps Up Retaliation as U.S. Says War Could Last Weeks
summary_full: Iran targeted American sites throughout the region as President Trump said the United States was ready for a protracted fight. U.S. embassies and Amazon data centers were among the sites struck.
summary_public: Iran targeted American sites throughout the region as President Trump said the United States was ready for a protracted fight. U.S. embassies and Amazon data centers were among the sites struck.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: Iran targeted American sites throughout the region
